page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7.32xlarge is a compute-optimized server instance built on the KVM hypervisor. It features 128 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at a base clock speed of 2.7 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The instance allocates exactly one thread per core, meaning hyperthreading is disabled, which ensures predictable compute performance for each virtual CPU.

The instance is configured with 256.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 2.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, requiring users to rely entirely on external block storage for data persistence. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 64 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput data transfers between instances and external services.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.c7.32xlarge offers high compute density with dedicated CPU allocation, making it suitable for workloads that require sustained CPU utilization without resource contention. However, the lack of local NVMe storage and the low memory-to-CPU ratio represent significant tradeoffs for memory-intensive or disk-heavy applications.
This hardware profile is designed for CPU-bound workloads such as high-performance computing, batch processing, scientific modeling, and large-scale web serving.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7.32xlarge is a compute-optimized instance featuring 128 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, this instance provides 128 vCPUs with a single thread per core, ensuring dedicated execution resources. It is equipped with 256.0 GB of RAM, establishing a 2.0 GB per core memory ratio. The instance lacks local storage and GPU accelerators, meaning all storage operations must utilize network-attached volumes. Network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 64 Gbps. This configuration is engineered for compute-heavy workloads such as batch processing, scientific simulations, and high-throughput web serving where dedicated CPU resources are critical and local storage is not required.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c7.32xlarge is a compute-optimized instance with 128 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and 64 Gbps network bandwidth, running on the KVM hypervisor with no local storage.

tagline: A dedicated 128-core compute-optimized instance featuring a 1:2 CPU-to-RAM ratio and 64 Gbps baseline network bandwidth without local storage.

256.0 GB of system memory providing 2.0 GB per core
64 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-throughput data transfer
KVM hypervisor with single-threaded cores and no hyperthreading
No local storage or GPU accelerators included
Suited for high-performance computing, batch processing, and web serving
